motive: Dispute over the treasure map and old coins
evidence: Marcus's last text at 10:28pm indicating a conflict over ownership.
Larry's damp hiking boots with fresh mud contradicting his alibi of staying indoors.
The unlocked back door suggesting someone left or entered without notice.
The inside-out rubber glove indicating a hasty cleanup after the crime.
The cigarette butt hidden by Marcus, suggesting he was trying to hide his habits from the group.
